about.description: RealRoof was founded to do more than just build roofs, windows, decks, and siding. We are here to build a movement. Born in OΓÇÖFallon, Missouri, RealRoof was launched by Elisha Sellers, a experienced roofing professional and globally licensed combat sports official who brings uncompromising discipline and executive precision to every project.

image.alt: RealRoof team - Locally owned roofing and exterior remodeling company

description: RealRoof provides expert exterior remodeling services for homes and businesses. From windows and doors to roofing and decks, our team delivers quality craftsmanship with uncompromising precision.

services.title: Residential Roofing
services.description: Expert roofing services for homes using premium materials from IKO and CertainTeed. Full replacement, repairs, and inspections with 50-year transferable warranties.
services.overview: Professional residential roofing services that combine uncompromising precision with architectural excellence. We specialize in high-performance asphalt shingles, architectural roofing systems, and durable weather-proofing solutions tailored for Missouri's diverse climate.

benefits.title: 50-Year Warranty
benefits.description: Our premium installations come with industry-leading, fully transferable 50-year manufacturer warranties.

benefits.title: Certified Experts
benefits.description: IKO Certified Pro and CertainTeed Certified Shingle Masters executing with uncompromising discipline.

benefits.title: Storm Ready
benefits.description: Class 4 impact-resistant shingles available to protect your home against severe midwestern hail.

benefits.title: Ventilation Focus
benefits.description: Advanced ridge-venting systems designed to drastically lower your summer cooling costs.

process.title: Drone Inspection
process.description: We utilize advanced drone imagery to thoroughly map your roof's condition without disturbing the surface.

process.title: Action Plan
process.description: A comprehensive brief is provided outlining our exact material choices and the underlying structural strategy.

process.title: Material Drop
process.description: Materials arrive securely, taking care to protect your driveway and surrounding landscaping.

process.title: Tactical Tear-off
process.description: Old roofing is stripped down to the decking. We inspect and replace any compromised plywood.

process.title: Precision Install
process.description: Ice and water shields are deployed followed by architectural shingles layered flawlessly.

process.title: Magnetic Sweep
process.description: Final 6-point inspection and a thorough magnetic sweep of your property to ensure zero nails are left behind.

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
faq.answer: Thanks to our disciplined crews, most residential roofs are completely replaced and cleaned up in just 1-2 days.

faq.question: Can you help with insurance claims?
faq.answer: Yes. We work closely with insurance adjusters following severe storm damage to ensure you get fully covered for full replacements.

faq.question: Do you install over old shingles?
faq.answer: Never. We believe in doing the job right the first time. We always tear off old material to inspect the underlying wood decking.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a replacement vs. repair?
faq.answer: We provide honest assessments. If your roof is less than 15 years old and the damage is localized, repairs are often the strategic choice.

services.title: Windows & Doors
services.description: Energy-efficient vinyl windows and premium doors that enhance curb appeal and reduce energy costs. ProVia Certified Installer.
services.overview: Our window and door solutions offer the perfect blend of structural integrity and modern design. We install high-efficiency vinyl and wood windows along with secure, insulated entry doors that reduce energy costs and increase your property's value.

benefits.title: Drastic Energy Savings
benefits.description: Low-E glass and argon gas fills create a thermal barrier that massively lowers utility bills.

benefits.title: Maximum Security
benefits.description: Multi-point locking systems on our doors ensure your family remains safe against forced entry.

benefits.title: Noise Reduction
benefits.description: Acoustic-grade insulated glass significantly mutes outside noise from traffic and neighbors.

benefits.title: Curb Appeal Boost
benefits.description: Custom color matching and intricate trim designs transform the front facade of your property.

process.title: Design Consult
process.description: We analyze your home's architecture to recommend the perfect grid patterns and window styles.

process.title: Laser Measurement
process.description: Every opening is measured down to the millimeter for a perfect, draft-free custom fit.

process.title: Custom Fabrication
process.description: Your windows are custom-built in state-of-the-art facilities using premium materials.

process.title: Careful Extraction
process.description: We strategically remove the old frames without damaging your existing interior drywall or trim.

process.title: Level Installation
process.description: Windows are shimmed, leveled, and sealed with high-performance exterior grade caulking.

process.title: Function Test
process.description: We verify all locks, sashes, and seals operate effortlessly before walking you through the final reveal.

faq.question: Why should I upgrade my windows?
faq.answer: New windows eliminate drafts, lower heating/cooling bills by up to 35%, and vastly improve the ambient sound dampening of your home.

faq.question: Are your windows energy star rated?
faq.answer: Yes, we exclusively install Energy Star rated products utilizing Low-E coatings and argon gas technology.

faq.question: Can I finance my window replacement?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer tailored financing packages ensuring you can upgrade your home's efficiency without a huge upfront burden.

faq.question: Does installation make a mess?
faq.answer: We deploy drop cloths internally and clean the exterior flawlessly. We leave your home cleaner than we found it.

services.title: Custom Decks
services.description: Beautiful, low-maintenance decks designed for outdoor living.  Wolf Home Products Certified installers for premium composite decking.
services.tagline: Professional windows & doors services with uncompromising precision and architectural excellence.
services.overview: Transform your backyard into a luxury retreat. We offer two premium decking paths: Low-Maintenance Composite for wood-like aesthetics with zero upkeep, and Structural PVC Decking for ultimate durability, moisture resistance, and lighter color retention. Both systems are designed to withstand the elements while providing elegance for your family. We bring commercial-grade discipline and architectural beauty to every project. Our mission is your property's long-term protection and value enhancement.

benefits.title: Material Choice
benefits.description: Choose between capped composite (wood/plastic blend) or cellular PVC (100% polymer) depending on your shade preference and moisture exposure.

benefits.title: Load-Bearing Integrity
benefits.description: We over-engineer our footings and joists, exceeding local codes to ensure absolute structural safety.

benefits.title: Custom Enhancements
benefits.description: Integrate low-voltage LED stair lighting, outdoor kitchens, or customized railing architectures.

benefits.title: Cool-Touch Tech
benefits.description: Select decking lines feature advanced heat-mitigating technology to keep barefoot paths comfortable in July.

process.title: 3D CAD Rendering
process.description: We design your deck in a 3D environment so you visualize the footprint and railing styles before we build.

process.title: Code Permitting
process.description: We secure all required municipal permits and handle neighborhood HOA approvals on your behalf.

process.title: Foundation Pour
process.description: Deep concrete footers are poured below the frost line to prevent any winter heaving.

process.title: Robust Framing
process.description: Treated lumber framing is erected using heavy-duty galvanized structural brackets.

process.title: Toe Nail Screw
process.description: Deck boards are installed using toe nail screw systems for a flawless, nail-free walking surface.

process.title: Safety Audit
process.description: Final inspection of all stair risers, railing tensions, and gate latches to ensure code compliance.

faq.question: Wood vs Composite vs PVC?
faq.answer: Wood requires bi-annual maintenance. Composite offers a wood-like look with no upkeep. PVC decking is lighter in weight, resists moisture more effectively, and is the best choice for pool decks or deep shade.

faq.question: Do you handle the city permits?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle the entire bureaucratic process. From rendering blueprints to meeting city inspectors on site.

faq.question: Can you build over my old foundation?
faq.answer: It depends on age and code compliance. We perform a structural audit on your existing joists before making a recommendation.

faq.question: How long does a deck build take?
faq.answer: Most custom decks take 1-2 weeks from the day we break ground, dependent on size and municipal inspection delays.

services.title: Siding, Soffit & Fascia
services.description: Protect your home and enhance curb appeal with professional siding, soffit, and fascia installation and repair services.
services.overview: Siding is the armor of your home. We install premium vinyl and composite siding systems engineered to resist high winds, repel moisture, and eliminate the need for future exterior painting.

benefits.title: Flawless Aesthetics
benefits.description: Vibrant, fade-resistant color palettes combined with authentic woodgrain textures elevate your property value.

benefits.title: Moisture Management
benefits.description: Vented soffit systems ensure your attic breathes, preventing toxic mold from forming.

benefits.title: Termite Proof
benefits.description: Modern vinyl systems absolutely guarantee you will never deal with wood-boring insects or rotting.

benefits.title: Thermal Enclosure
benefits.description: Insulated siding options wrap your home's studs in a continuous blanket, eliminating thermal bridging.

process.title: Design Mockup
process.description: Select from hundreds of colors, profiles, and board & batten accents.

process.title: Exterior Strip
process.description: Existing siding is removed; underlying studs and sheathing are inspected for rot.

process.title: Weather Wrap
process.description: High-performance breathable house wrap is installed to block water but allow vapor escape.

process.title: Fascia Capping
process.description: Custom bent aluminum is applied to all exposed wood fascia, eliminating painting forever.

process.title: Siding Click-Lock
process.description: Panels are hung securely with precision expansion joints to allow for seasonal temperature shifts.

process.title: Seal & Clean
process.description: Premium caulking is applied around all windows and doors for a weatherproof final seal.

faq.question: Why replace Soffit and Fascia?
faq.answer: These elements protect your roofline. Rotting wood allows pests into your attic and restricts necessary airflow. Wrapping them in aluminum solves this permanently.

faq.question: Will insulated siding save me money?
faq.answer: Yes. It acts as an exterior thermal blanket, covering the exposed wood studs that traditional fiberglass interior insulation cannot reach.

faq.question: How long will vinyl siding last?
faq.answer: High-quality premium vinyl can last 30-50 years or longer, maintaining its color without needing to be repainted.

faq.question: Can you match my existing trim?
faq.answer: Yes, we custom bend our own aluminum on site to perfectly match or contrast your existing window and door trims.

services.title: Commercial Roofing
services.description: Specialized commercial roofing solutions including TPO and EPDM systems. Installation, repair, and maintenance for businesses.
services.overview: Protect your inventory, equipment, and employees with military-precision commercial roofing systems. We specialize in TPO, EPDM, and flat-roof coatings tailored for high-durability and energy reflection.

benefits.title: Cool Roof Energy Savings
benefits.description: White TPO membranes reflect harmful UV rays, drastically decreasing warehouse and office cooling costs.

benefits.title: Seam Welded Security
benefits.description: Hot-air welded seams bind TPO sheets together creating a monolithic, impermeable barrier.

benefits.title: Zero Downtime
benefits.description: We schedule staging and logistics strictly to ensure your daily business operations are never interrupted.

benefits.title: Complex Flashing
benefits.description: Expert sealing around complex commercial HVAC units, parapet walls, and ventilation pipes.

process.title: Core Testing
process.description: We take core samples of your existing membrane and insulation to detect hidden moisture mapping.

process.title: Logistical Staging
process.description: Cranes and dumpsters are positioned to minimize impact on your employee parking and shipping docks.

process.title: Substrate Repair
process.description: Damaged ISO boards and decking are removed to ensure a solid foundational deck.

process.title: Tapered Insulation
process.description: We install custom tapered insulation systems to correct any pre-existing standing water or drainage issues.

process.title: Membrane Welding
process.description: Rolls are laid and robotic hot-air welders are used to fuse the seams permanently.

process.title: Manufacturer Walk
process.description: Final walks are completed alongside the manufacturer representative to issue the No Dollar Limit warranty.

faq.question: TPO vs EPDM?
faq.answer: TPO is heat-reflective and welded for superior seam strength. EPDM (rubber) is highly durable against impacts but absorbs heat. We recommend TPO for most applications.

faq.question: Are your crews certified?
faq.answer: We maintain top-tier certifications with leading commercial manufacturers, allowing us to offer elite NDL warranties.

faq.question: What is an NDL warranty?
faq.answer: A No Dollar Limit warranty covers all labor and materials required to fix a leak during the warranty span, backed directly by the manufacturer.

faq.question: Do you offer preventative maintenance?
faq.answer: Yes. Proactive bi-annual maintenance programs drastically extend the life of a commercial roof by catching issues early.

services.title: Gutters & Protection
services.description: Professional gutter installation and gutter protection systems to prevent water damage and maintain proper drainage.
services.overview: Effective water management is critical for your home's structural integrity. We fabricate seamless 5-inch and 6-inch aluminum gutters right on your property, paired with the industry's highest-quality leaf guard systems.

benefits.title: Foundation Protection
benefits.description: Moving massive volumes of roof water away from your foundation prevents basement flooding and hydraulic pressure.

benefits.title: On-Site Extrusion
benefits.description: Gutters are formed perfectly to fit the length of your home with zero weak seams or joints in the middle.

benefits.title: Micro-Mesh Defense
benefits.description: Our premium guards block leaves, pine needles, and shingle grit, while allowing torrential rain to flow through.

benefits.title: Heavy Duty Brackets
benefits.description: Hidden hangers screwed directly into fascia board ensure your gutters never sag under the weight of winter ice.

process.title: Pitch Mapping
process.description: We analyze your roofline to determine the correct slope ratios and exactly where downspouts must be placed.

process.title: Removal
process.description: Old failing gutters are detached and disposed of. Fascia boards are checked for water rot.

process.title: Extrusion
process.description: Using our mobile machine, heavy-gauge aluminum is rolled into perfectly seamless gutters tailored to your home's specific measurements.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Heavy-duty hidden brackets attach securely to the fascia ensuring maximum load-bearing capability against snow and ice.

process.title: Guard Placement
process.description: Micro-mesh leaf protection is snapped securely into place over the entire system.

process.title: Water Test
process.description: We test the flow dynamics to ensure rapid drainage leaving no standing water or weak points.

faq.question: Why 6-inch gutters over 5-inch?
faq.answer: 6-inch gutters hold roughly 40% more water. With the severity of midwestern storms, the added capacity prevents devastating overflow.

faq.question: Do I really need leaf guards?
faq.answer: If you have trees within 100 feet of your property, absolutely. Gutters filled with debris stop working entirely, causing water to rot your roof deck and flood your basement.

faq.question: How do seamless gutters work?
faq.answer: We bring a machine to your house that rolls out a single piece of aluminum cut to the exact length of your roof edge. No seams means no mid-run leaks.

faq.question: Can gutters cause ice dams?
faq.answer: Gutters don't cause ice dams (poor attic ventilation does), but clogged gutters can exacerbate them by trapping freezing water.

services.title: Vinyl & Aluminum Fencing
services.description: Professional vinyl and aluminum fencing services designed to deliver security, privacy, and long-lasting curb appeal. We specialize in durable, low-maintenance fencing solutions built to handle Missouri’s changing weather conditions while enhancing the beauty and value of your property.
services.overview: Professional vinyl and aluminum fencing services designed to deliver security, privacy, and long-lasting curb appeal. We specialize in durable, low-maintenance fencing solutions built to handle Missouri’s changing weather conditions while enhancing the beauty and value of your property.

benefits.title: Durable Materials
benefits.description: High-quality vinyl and aluminum fencing built to withstand harsh weather, rust, fading, and everyday wear.

benefits.title: Low Maintenance
benefits.description: Enjoy a clean, modern fence with minimal upkeep — no painting, staining, or frequent repairs required.

benefits.title: Enhanced Security
benefits.description: Strong and reliable fencing solutions designed to improve privacy, safety, and property protection.

benefits.title: Custom Styles
benefits.description: Choose from a variety of colors, heights, and designs to match your home’s style and curb appeal.

process.title: Property Assessment
process.description: We inspect your property layout, measurements, and installation requirements to recommend the best fencing solution.

process.title: Design Selection
process.description: Choose from a variety of vinyl and aluminum fence styles, colors, heights, and customization options.

process.title: Material Delivery
process.description: All fencing materials are delivered safely and prepared for a smooth, organized installation process.

process.title: Site Preparation
process.description: Our team prepares the installation area by marking boundaries and ensuring proper alignment and stability.

process.title: Precision Installation
process.description: Your fence is professionally installed with attention to durability, security, and clean finishing details.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.description: We complete a full quality check and walkthrough to ensure your new fence meets our craftsmanship standards.

faq.question: How long does vinyl or aluminum fencing last?
faq.answer: Vinyl and aluminum fences are highly durable and can last 20–30 years or more with proper installation and minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Which fencing option is better for low maintenance?
faq.answer: Vinyl fencing requires very little maintenance since it does not rust, rot, or require painting.

faq.question: Is aluminum fencing good for security?
faq.answer: Yes, aluminum fencing is strong, weather-resistant, and provides excellent security while maintaining an elegant appearance.

faq.question: Can I customize the style and color of my fence?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer multiple colors, heights, and design options to match your property’s style and needs.

faq.question: How long does fence installation take?
faq.answer: Most residential fencing projects are completed within a few days, depending on the property size and project complexity.

services.heroDescription: Professional vinyl and aluminum fencing services designed to deliver security, privacy, and long-lasting curb appeal. We specialize in durable, low-maintenance fencing solutions built to handle Missouri’s changing weather conditions while enhancing the beauty and value of your property.

services.title: PVC Decking
services.description: 100% synthetic decking engineered for superior moisture resistance and lighter, cooler surfaces.
services.heroDescription: Professional pvc decking services with uncompromising precision and architectural excellence.
services.benefitsDescription: Experience the difference with our unwavering commitment to commercial-grade excellence.
services.processDescription: Experience the difference with our unwavering commitment to commercial-grade excellence.
services.overview: Our PVC decking solutions represent the pinnacle of synthetic deck technology. Unlike composite which contains wood flour, cellular PVC is 100% polymer. This provides unparalleled resistance to moisture, rot, and insects. It is the ideal solution for pool surrounds, heavily shaded lots, or homeowners who prefer lighter, cooler deck colors that never absorb water. We bring commercial-grade discipline and architectural beauty to every project. Our mission is your property's long-term protection and value enhancement.

benefits.title: Pool-Ready Design
benefits.description: Since PVC contains zero organic material, it will never swell, cup, or rot from standing water or pool splashing.

benefits.title: Brighter Aesthetics
benefits.description: PVC can achieve true, crisp whites and light coastal grays that are difficult to produce with darker composite materials.

benefits.title: Superior Mold Resistance
benefits.description: The dense, non-porous surface prevents mold spores and mildew from ever taking root, ideal for damp, shaded backyards.

benefits.title: Stable Dimensions
benefits.description: PVC experiences less thermal expansion and contraction than composite, allowing for tighter miters and cleaner lines.

process.title: Color Matching
process.description: Since PVC contains zero organic material, it will never swell, cup, or rot from standing water or pool splashing.

process.title: Framing Prep
process.description: PVC can achieve true, crisp whites and light coastal grays that are difficult to produce with darker composite materials.

process.title: Foundation Pour
process.description: The dense, non-porous surface prevents mold spores and mildew from ever taking root, ideal for damp, shaded backyards.

process.title: Robust Framing
process.description: Pressure-treated framing is installed with premium tape on all joist tops to create a barrier between wood and PVC.

process.title: PVC Fastening
process.description: Specialized pneumatic fasteners or Cortex hidden screws are used to secure the 100% synthetic boards flawlessly.

process.title: Final Trim
process.description: PVC fascia and riser boards are applied for a cohesive, fully synthetic envelope that requires zero paint.

faq.question: What is the difference between PVC and Composite decking?
faq.answer: Composite is a blend of wood fibers and plastic; it's heavy and can absorb trace moisture. PVC is pure plastic (polymer). It's lighter, fully waterproof, and stays cooler in the sun than traditional dark composites.

faq.question: Is PVC decking slippery when wet?
faq.answer: Premium PVC brands feature an embossed wood-grain texture that provides excellent traction, even around pools. We recommend specific lines for wet applications.

faq.question: Will PVC decking fade?
faq.answer: PVC is highly color stable. Unlike early generation composites, modern PVC features UV-stabilized capstock that resists fading significantly better, especially in lighter color tones.

faq.question: Does PVC decking require special framing?
faq.answer: Because it is lighter and slightly more flexible, we adhere to stricter joist spacing (typically 12" on center) to ensure the deck feels as solid as a hardwood floor.

gridSection.description: Every detail matters when it comes to structural integrity. Our team brings commercial-grade standards to every project across the St. Louis area.

section.headline: Locally-Owned & Mission-Driven

ceo.name: Elisha Sellers
ceo.title: Founder & CEO

badges.bottom: ProVia ΓÇó IKO ΓÇó CertainTeed ΓÇó Wolf

quotes: RealRoof was built to be more than just a remodeling company. It was built to lead a movement.
description: Based in O'Fallon, Missouri, RealRoof was founded by Elisha Sellers, a seasoned home improvement professional who brings discipline, precision, and accountability to every project. With years of leadership experience at some of the largest home improvement companies in North America, Elisha saw firsthand how the industry had shifted away from homeowners and toward profits, leaving people with high prices, poor communication, and broken trust.

Elisha knew it didn't have to be that way. RealRoof was created to restore what the industry lost—trust, craftsmanship, and doing the job right the first time. Today, we stand as a local company built to compete with the biggest names in the country, not through gimmicks, but through transparency, quality work, and a relentless commitment to our customers.
Our systems are built for precision, but our strength is our people—driven professionals who take ownership, communicate clearly, and treat every home like their own.

section.headline: Guiding with vision & integrity
section.description: Experienced leadership committed to excellence in every project, partnership, and promise.

members.name: Elisha Sellers
description: Originally from Nashville, Tennessee, Elisha was raised in Southern Illinois. Growing up in a challenging environment, Elisha faced obstacles that inspired a strong work ethic early on. Later, Elisha's grandparents stepped in to teach what it truly means to show up for family and build something stronger than what you were given.

Elisha carried those lessons into professional leadership in the home improvement industry, developing discipline, resilience, and the ability to perform under pressure. This experience reinforced a mindset that still defines Elisha today. No excuses. No shortcuts. Just execution.
After years of leadership at top-tier home improvement organizations, Elisha founded RealRoof to bring trust, transparency, and elite craftsmanship back to homeowners.

members.name: Chrissy Long
description: Say hello to the newest powerhouse at RealRoof- our amazing new executive assistant, Chrissy Long! She is the backbone that ensures nothing falls through the cracks - because every great company needs a reliable teammate, and every great customer deserves amazing work!
Here is a little bit about Chrissy and what she has to say about working at RealRoof:

" I have found my home, a place with genuine people who really care about their customers and employees, which today is sometimes rare. I truly believe my calling in life is to help others, and this job is exactly that, purposeful and fulfilling. It also gives me the opportunity to live a better-tuned life, take care of my daughters, and still have time for the hobbies I enjoy. When I'm not at work; I am either napping, training for a kickboxing match, serving at my local church, or enjoying time with my family. I really love a simplistic, peaceful lifestyle and I hope to bring those attributes into my work life. "

members.name: Austin
description: Drumroll, please! ≡ƒÑü It's time for you to meet the dream team behind RealRoof!≡ƒªà
First up is our amazing canvas manager, Austin! We are so grateful to have a leader who brings creativity, care, and amazing organization to every project.
Here's what Austin has to say about working for the company:

"As a Canvas Manager at RealRoof, going on 5 months I'm proud and grateful to be part of a team where growth isn't just encouraged-it's built into everything we do. That mindset doesn't stop at work; it flows into how I live. I thrive outdoors; whether I'm at the park with my kids, exploring nature, or enjoying a sporting event. I truly believe connection, movement, and joy go hand in hand. Yoga and mindfulness practices keep me grounded, but I'm always reaching forward, learning, and evolving. At work and in life, I believe growth isn't a destination-it's a daily practice, shaped by purpose, presence and the courage to keep showing up, fully."
Thank you Austin for all you do for the team!

members.name: Elisha
description: Elisha is a construction sales professional with over 12 years of experience specializing in windows, doors, and roofing. He's known for his straightforward approach, strong product knowledge, and commitment to helping customers find the right solutions for their homes.

As an Illinois resident, Elisha takes pride in serving his local community with honesty and dependable service. Outside of work, Elisha is a dedicated softball dad and enjoys spending his free time on the golf course.

founder.quote: RealRoof was built to be more than just a remodeling company. It was built to lead a movement.
bio: Based in O'Fallon, Missouri, RealRoof was founded by Elisha Sellers, a seasoned home improvement professional who brings discipline, precision, and accountability to every project. With years of leadership experience at some of the largest home improvement companies in North America, Elisha saw firsthand how the industry had shifted away from homeowners and toward profits, leaving people with high prices, poor communication, and broken trust.

Elisha knew it didn't have to be that way. RealRoof was created to restore what the industry lost—trust, craftsmanship, and doing the job right the first time. Today, we stand as a local company built to compete with the biggest names in the country, not through gimmicks, but through transparency, quality work, and a relentless commitment to our customers.
Our systems are built for precision, but our strength is our people—driven professionals who take ownership, communicate clearly, and treat every home like their own.
founder.secondaryQuote: This is freedom in construction formΓÇöfreedom from overpriced corporate contractors, freedom from broken promises, and freedom to expect more from your remodeler.

stats.headline: Trusted by Homeowners Across the Region
stats.description: Numbers speak louder than words. Here's what we've achieved together with our valued customers.

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.description: To revolutionize the remodeling industry by putting people firstΓÇörestoring trust through transparency, exceptional craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to doing whatΓÇÖs right.

principles.title: Fairness
principles.desc: Honest pricing with zero hidden agendas. Every quote is transparent, every invoice is exactΓÇöbuilding trust through radical transparency.

principles.title: Honesty
principles.desc: Transparent communication at every milestone. No surprises, no shortcutsΓÇöjust unwavering integrity that defines our character.

principles.title: Hard Work
principles.desc: Relentless pursuit of perfection until excellence is achieved. We measure success by your satisfaction, not by the clock.

principles.title: Precision
principles.desc: commercial-grade accuracy in every detail. From initial measurements to final executionΓÇöwhere craftsmanship meets mathematical certainty.

capabilities.headline: World Class Capabilities
capabilities.description: Every detail matters when it comes to structural integrity. Our team brings commercial-grade standards to every project across the St. Louis area.

values.headline: Built on Unshakable Principles
values.description: Six principles that guide every decision, every interaction, and every project we undertake.

items.title: Customer First
items.description: Our customers always come first here at RealRoof. We ensure that our customers can have complete confidence in the quality of our work, knowing that we will always act in their best interests and stand behind our products and services with unwavering dedication.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: In the remodeling industry, integrity means consistently doing what is right, even when no one is watching. We believe in keeping our promises, providing accurate estimates, and delivering on our commitments without cutting corners.

items.title: Extreme Ownership
items.description: By embracing this mindset, we ensure that we always act in the best interests of our clients, driving continuous improvement and achieving excellence in every project we undertake. We are not perfect by any means, but we are perfect at fixing any mistake along the way.

items.title: Gratitude
items.description: By expressing gratitude, we build lasting relationships and create a positive impact, ensuring every interaction is rooted in kindness and acknowledgment. We believe that a thankful mindset inspires excellence in service and craftsmanship, making every project a shared celebration.

items.title: Growth
items.description: We believe that growth is essential not only for individual team members but also for the company as a whole. This core value drives us to seek out new learning opportunities, embrace innovation, and stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices.

section.headline: What Our Clients Say

testimonials.name: Jason K.
testimonials.text: RealRoof is top-notch. The owner is one of the hardest-working, most professional people you'll meet. His attention to detail and pride in his work really stand out ΓÇö you can tell he truly cares about doing things the right way. He's reliable, respectful, and easy to work with ΓÇö the kind of person you can trust to get the job done right.

testimonials.name: Nathan Gearing
testimonials.text: I had the pleasure of working with RealRoof for a recent construction project, and I couldn't be more impressed with their professionalism, quality of work, and attention to detail. From the initial consultation to project completion, the team was communicative, punctual, and dedicated to getting the job done right.

testimonials.name: Lucas Barth
testimonials.text: RealRoof did a great job at my house with over 30 window replacements. There was clear, transparent and timely communication through the entire process and the installation went really well. I will recommend Elisha and RealRoof to anyone looking for windows.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: Elisha and his team replaced our roof after storm damage. They handled everything with the insurance company and made the process stress-free. The quality of work is outstanding and the new roof looks amazing!

testimonials.name: Mike Thompson
testimonials.text: We hired RealRoof for a commercial TPO roof installation. Professional, on time, and within budget. Highly recommend their commercial roofing services.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Answers to common questions about our exterior remodeling services in St. Louis.

labels.noResults: No questions found matching your criteria.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a range of services including residential roofing, commercial roofing, vinyl windows, entry doors, custom decks, siding, soffit, fascia, and gutters. We're your complete exterior remodeling solution in St. Louis.

items.question: Do you provide free estimates?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free inspections and estimates for all projects. Book your free quote today and get 15% off your project if you schedule by the end of the month!

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured to ensure you receive professional and secure services. We're also IKO Certified Pro, CertainTeed Certified Shingle Master, and ProVia Certified Installers.

items.question: Do you offer financing or payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options and convenient payment plans to make your project affordable and stress-free. We partner with some of the largest financing companies in the country to provide easy approval options.

items.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
items.answer: Most residential roof replacements are completed within 1-3 days, depending on the size of your home and weather conditions. Larger or commercial projects may take longer. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free estimate.

items.question: What warranties do you offer on roofing?
items.answer: We install premium materials backed by 50-year transferable manufacturer warranties. Additionally, every project includes our Ten-Year Workmanship Guarantee, giving you peace of mind long after installation.

items.question: What types of windows do you install?
items.answer: We install premium vinyl windows including double-hung, casement, sliding, and bay windows. As ProVia Certified Installers, we ensure professional installation and energy-efficient products that reduce your utility bills.

items.question: What decking materials do you use?
items.answer: As  Wolf Home Products Certified installers, we specialize in premium composite decking that offers durability, low maintenance, and beautiful aesthetics. We also offer pressure-treated wood options for traditional decks.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve Missouri (St. Louis County, St. Louis City, St. Charles County, Jefferson County, Franklin County) and Illinois (Saint Clair County, Monroe County, Madison County).

items.question: Can you handle large-scale projects?
items.answer: Yes, we have the expertise and resources to handle both small and large-scale construction projects. We have a proven track record working with large federal roofing and construction projects.
